name: shop_coin_packs
description: Six tiers of the SAME gold coin (a bright glossy gold coin with a smooth embossed five-point star and a darker gold rim, one small sparkle at most), escalating value staging: 1) a single neat stack of coins; 2) three stacks of coins side by side; 3) a tied pouch of coins; 4) an open wooden box filled with coins; 5) a wooden cart heaped with coins; 6) a treasure chest overflowing with coins on top of a large coin pile.
prompt_extra: every cell repeats the identical star coin design; ONLY star coins appear — no gems, no jewels, no other treasure; only quantity and staging grow per tier

variants.name: v4
variants.prompt_extra: a touch more sparkle and shine accents
